address: Numak Tower, Opposite Equatorial Mall, Kyaggwe Road, Kampala, Uganda
officeHours: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM
heroDescription: Discover the Pearl of Africa with Us. Located in the heart of Kampala, Uganda, we craft tailored trips that blend adventure, culture, and nature, showcasing Uganda's stunning landscapes and vibrant communities.
aboutTitle: Nexdo Adventours: Trusted Tour Company in Uganda — Your Story Starts Here
aboutText:
Travel is not about ticking places off a list. It's about the sunrise over Lake Bunyonyi that made you go quiet. The gorilla that locked eyes with you in Bwindi. The windows-down playlist, the red dust on your shoes, the stories you'll tell for years.

That's the kind of travel we believe in. That's why we started Nexdo Adventours — a Kampala-based tour and travel company built to show you the real Uganda.

Easter 2021: Four friends, one 4x4, a crazy idea. We drove to Jinja, got lost twice, ate the best rolex by the roadside, and ended with a sunset boat cruise we didn't even book. No rushed schedule. No hidden fees. Just heart and memories. When we got back, people kept asking: 'Can you organize tours in Uganda for us?' That question became Nexdo Adventours.
servicesSubtitle: Tailored experiences for every kind of traveler

services.title: Tailored Safaris
services.description: Customized wildlife tours to Uganda's best national parks including Queen Elizabeth and Murchison Falls.

services.title: Gorilla & Chimp Trekking
services.description: Bwindi Impenetrable Forest and Kibale Forest experiences with expert guides tracking primates.

services.title: Cultural Immersion
services.description: Explore Kampala's history, local markets, and community projects for a truly Ugandan experience.

services.title: Adventure Activities
services.description: Rafting in Jinja, hiking, nature walks, and more adrenaline-pumping adventures across Uganda.

services.title: Groups & Private Tours
services.description: Flexibility for any size or type of trip. We handle everything from solo travelers to large groups.

ctaText: Whether it's a gorilla trek, a Jinja rafting trip, or a curated group experience — let's make it happen.
newsletterText: New trips land in your inbox first. Monthly destinations, early-bird spots, perks and travel inspo — curated and sent once or twice a month. No noise, just the good stuff.

destinations.title: Bwindi Impenetrable Forest
destinations.whyVisit: Home to half the world's mountain gorillas, Bwindi is a UNESCO World Heritage site offering the most unforgettable wildlife encounter on earth.
reasons: Track mountain gorillas in their natural habitat
Explore ancient rainforest with over 120 mammal species
Guided nature walks to waterfalls and Batwa cave trails
Birdwatcher's paradise with 350+ bird species
Community encounters with the Batwa pygmy people

destinations.title: Queen Elizabeth NP
destinations.whyVisit: Uganda's most popular national park boasts tree-climbing lions, Kazinga Channel boat cruises, and incredible biodiversity.
reasons: Game drives to see lions, elephants, buffaloes, and antelope
Boat cruise along the Kazinga Channel — hippos, crocs, birds
Tree-climbing lions of the Ishasha sector
Lake Katwe salt mines and flamingo watching
Mweya Peninsula panoramic views of the Rwenzoris

destinations.title: Jinja — Adventure Hub
destinations.whyVisit: The source of the Nile River and Uganda's adrenaline capital, Jinja offers world-class adventure activities surrounded by stunning scenery.
reasons: White-water rafting on the Nile (Grade 3-5 rapids)
Bungee jumping and kayaking
Source of the Nile boat tour
Quad biking and horse riding along the riverbanks
Sunset cruises and riverside dining

destinations.title: Kampala — City of Seven Hills
destinations.whyVisit: Uganda's vibrant capital blends modern energy with deep cultural roots — from bustling markets to historic sites and lively nightlife.
reasons: Visit the Uganda Museum and Kasubi Tombs (UNESCO)
Shop at Owino Market and craft villages
Explore the Ndere Cultural Centre for music & dance
Nightlife at Kabalagala and Acacia Avenue
Panoramic views from the Gaddafi Mosque and Kololo Hill

destinations.title: Divine Resort and Spa
destinations.whyVisit: A premium relaxation getaway just outside Kampala. Perfect for couples retreats, group unwinding, or solo relaxation.
reasons: Swimming pool and spa treatments
Boat rides on the resort lake
Nature walks and flower swing
Archery and paintball target shooting
Live band performances and bonfire nights
Overnight stays in luxury rooms available

destinations.title: Lemala Wild Waters Lodge
destinations.whyVisit: A stunning island lodge on the Nile with thrilling water adventures and luxury relaxation.
reasons: Return boat ride to the island
Swimming in natural Nile rock pools
3-course lunch with wine
Sunset views over the Nile
Transport from Kampala in a luxury Landcruiser
Overnight packages available for 2+ days

tugendeEfort.title: Tugende Efort — Fort Portal Experience
tugendeEfort.description: Join us in August for Tugende Efort, an exclusive Nexdo Adventours experience in the heart of the Rwenzori region. Enjoy authentic culture, music, and unforgettable moments curated by our team.
